title: Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
company: Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Surat office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates:
Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates!
